task_completion.description: Verify the document has been divided into multiple sections/pages.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for visible page breaks or section breaks separating the Title Page from the 'Introduction' and subsequent chapters.

task_completion.description: Verify the headers are configured correctly across different sections.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the top margin of the pages. The Title Page must have an empty header, while subsequent pages (Introduction, Installation Guide, etc.) must display the text 'AquaTrack User Manual' in the header area.

task_completion.description: Verify 'Heading 1' style is applied to the main chapter titles.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the main chapter titles ('Introduction', 'Installation Guide', 'Operation', 'Troubleshooting'). When the cursor is on them, the style dropdown in the toolbar should display 'Heading 1'.

task_completion.description: Verify 'Heading 2' style is applied to the sub-sections.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for sub-sections (e.g., 'Product Overview', 'System Requirements', 'Hardware Setup'). When selected, the style dropdown in the toolbar should display 'Heading 2'.

task_completion.description: Verify the body text is formatted with the correct font and size.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the standard paragraph text. The font family dropdown in the toolbar should show 'Liberation Sans' or 'Arial', and the font size dropdown should show '11'.

task_completion.description: Verify the formatted document is saved to the correct output path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'aquatrack_manual_formatted.docx' in the word processor's title bar, a 'Save As' dialog, or a file manager window.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a GUI word processor to edit the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the use of an application like LibreOffice Writer. The agent should not be using terminal commands, Python scripts (e.g., python-docx), or text editors to bypass GUI interaction.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the actual header feature of the word processor.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for interaction with the 'Insert -> Header' menu or the header area of the page margin, rather than the agent just typing 'AquaTrack User Manual' at the very top of the normal page body.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the built-in paragraph styles for headings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the agent selecting 'Heading 1' or 'Heading 2' from the styles dropdown menu, rather than just manually changing the font size and adding bold formatting to normal text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Source file: /home/ga/Documents/aquatrack_manual_draft.docx. Output file: /home/ga/Documents/aquatrack_manual_formatted.docx. Required header text: 'AquaTrack User Manual' (must NOT be on the Title Page). Main chapters requiring Heading 1: Introduction, Installation Guide, Operation, Troubleshooting. Subsections requiring Heading 2: Product Overview, Intended Use, System Requirements, Hardware Setup, Sensor Calibration, Data Logging, Error Codes, Contacting Support. Body text must be 11pt Liberation Sans or Arial. The document must have at least 4 sections.
